title: Marijampolė, Marijampolė County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Marijampolė, Marijampolė County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Marijampolė is a city in Marijampolė County with a population of 40,000. A city in southwestern Lithuania, known for its Franciscan monastery, the Marijampolė Basilica, and a strong agricultural and food processing tradition.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
